rules.rule_text:
rule genome
{
	meta:
		author = "Brian Wallace @botnet_hunter"
		author_email = "bwall@ballastsecurity.net"
		date = "2014-09-07"
		description = "Identify Genome"

	strings:
		$s1 = "Attempting to create more than one keyboard::Monitor instance"
		$s2 = "{Right windows}"
		$s3 = "Access violation - no RTTI data!"

	condition:
		all of them
}
